work.description: Work-related emails including meetings, deadlines, and business communications

personal.description: Personal communications from friends, family, and personal accounts

promotion.description: Sales, discounts, special offers, and marketing emails

newsletter.description: Regular updates, subscriptions, and periodic communications

support.description: Customer support, help requests, and technical issues

Spam.description: These emails are unsolicited and usually sell garbage products like weight loss pills or advertise services like fake crypto currency mining apps.
